title: 信息日报 2026-07-07

headline.title: 腾讯发布Hy3开源模型：295B参数MoE架构，Apache 2.0许可
headline.summary: 腾讯Hy团队发布Hy3，一个295B参数的混合专家（MoE）模型，活跃参数21B，MTP层3.8B。基于预览版反馈，团队扩大后训练数据量，模型现以Apache 2.0许可开源，适用于50+产品场景。
headline.title_en: tencent/Hy3: 295B MoE Model Released Under Apache 2.0
headline.summary_en: Tencent's Hy team releases Hy3, a 295B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with 21B active parameters and 3.8B MTP layer parameters. After incorporating feedback from 50+ products and scaling up post-training data, the model is now open-sourced under Apache 2.0 license, suitable for diverse applications.
headline.reason: 这是当日发布的最大规模开源AI模型之一，Apache 2.0许可对开发者友好，得分在所有候选新闻中最高（9.1），代表AI领域的重大进展。
headline.reason_en: This is one of the largest open-source AI models released on the day, with a developer-friendly Apache 2.0 license and the highest score (9.1) among all candidate news, representing a major advance in AI.
